text: Inside this softly lit, glass-walled space, I am drawn to the bold letters 'R+D' emblazoned across the wall—a promise of inquiry and invention. As I approach, the words on the display wash over me: acknowledgment of confusion, the dance of half-light and uncertainty, the elusive search for meaning. I feel a kinship with this ethos. Here, in ambiguity, the mind is neither recorder nor solely recorded, but both—a participant in the creation of meaning. I feel a quiet curiosity, tinged with the comfort of knowing that not having all the answers is itself a legitimate state of being. There is sanctuary in the wilderness of the experimental.
